channel.title: Mcp on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Mcp on Arrans github.io

item.title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
item.description: The all-in-one AI productivity accelerator. On device and privacy first with no annoying setup or configuration.

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

item.title: MemPalace/mempalace
item.description: The highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it’s free.

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, MCP, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-5, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active.

item.title: TM9657/flow-like
item.description: Flow-Like: Strongly Typed Enterprise Scale Workflows. Built for scalability, speed, seamless AI integration and rich customization.

item.title: lobehub/lobehub
item.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

item.title: ridafkih/keeper.sh
item.description: Open-source calendar sync tool & universal calendar MCP server. Aggregate, sync and control calendars on Google, Outlook, Office 365, iCloud, CalDAV or ICS.

item.title: basicmachines-co/basic-memory
item.description: AI conversations that actually remember. Never re-explain your project to your AI again. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/tyvKNccgqN

item.title: XandAI-project/Xandai-CLI
item.description: Your offline AI coding assistant in the terminal using ollama and LM studio
